title: hedyotis strigulosa var. coreana
intro: Hedyotis strigulosa var. coreana, also known as Korean false dragonhead, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are often used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hedyotis strigulosa var. coreana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and even help with wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, Hedyotis strigulosa var. coreana is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can be used in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and poultices.
